name: Conservative Vice Lords
description: The Conservative Vice Lords (CVL) are the oldest and original faction of the Almighty Vice Lord Nation, founded in 1958 in North Lawndale, Chicago. In the late 1960s, CVL Inc. became a legitimate non-profit opening businesses and job training programs. The positive era collapsed in the early 1970s when federal investigations shut them down.

sources.title: Conservative Vice Lords - Chicago Gang History
